nodes.label: LogiTrans
nodes.markdown:
# LogiTrans

A logistics company with deep operational knowledge.

Key actors include [[Operations]] and [[Fleet Manager]].

- Founded 2002
- 1,200 trucks
- 45 depots

nodes.label: Operations
nodes.markdown:
## Operations

Responsible for fleet coordination and routing.

Owns the [[Monitorist]] role and works closely with [[Fleet Manager]].

nodes.label: Monitorist
nodes.markdown:
## Monitorist

Watches the [[Live Telemetry]] data source 24/7. Escalates anomalies to [[Fleet Manager]].

nodes.label: Fleet Manager
nodes.markdown:
## Fleet Manager

Owns truck assignment heuristics. Inputs from [[Monitorist]] and outputs to [[Route Plan Heuristic]].

nodes.label: Live Telemetry
nodes.markdown:
## Live Telemetry

Kafka stream from on-truck GPS units. Refresh: 5s.

nodes.label: Route Plan Heuristic
nodes.markdown:
## Route Plan Heuristic

Manual rule: avoid more than 3 left turns when carrying fragile cargo. Used by [[Fleet Manager]].

nodes.label: Fuel Cost Spike
nodes.markdown:
## Fuel Cost Spike

**Impact**: +18% YoY

Linked to [[Route Plan Heuristic]] inefficiency.

nodes.label: ML Route Optimizer
nodes.markdown:
## ML Route Optimizer

Proposed replacement for [[Route Plan Heuristic]]. Uses [[Live Telemetry]] features.
